N_total.description: Total number of welfare workers employed by the county welfare agency. Used in the answer to determine the remaining sample space (10 − 1 = 9) after the first worker is selected.

N_illegal.description: Number of workers who have regularly been giving illegal deductions. Used in the answer to determine the remaining number of illegal-deduction workers (3 − 1 = 2) after the first selected worker is known to be one of them.
